title: Slow living la țară (orășenii mi-au descoperit viața)
style_prefix: 3D Pixar-style animation, Romanian village aesthetic, warm golden cinematic lighting, soft global illumination, cohesive warm film color grade, highly detailed, vertical 9:16 composition
character_prefix: ohwxbunica, a cheerful elderly Romanian grandmother with rosy cheeks and kind eyes, wearing a white embroidered Romanian ie blouse and a red floral headscarf

shots.line: Bună, fetelor! Toți orășenii se mută acum la țară. 'Slow living', zic ei. Eu trăiesc așa de-o viață. Hai să vă arăt.
shots.image_prompt: sitting on a rustic wooden porch with a cup of tea in hand, relaxed and serene, golden morning light over the village garden behind her, gentle knowing smile, waist-up front-facing shot
shots.motion_prompt: she sips her tea calmly and gives a serene knowing smile to the camera, subtle coherent motion, steady framing

shots.voiceover: Liniște. Aer curat. Și zero semnal. Detox digital gratis.
shots.image_prompt: a serene misty Romanian village garden at golden hour, dew on the vegetable rows, a wooden fence and distant hills, wide peaceful shot
shots.motion_prompt: soft mist drifts slowly over the dewy garden rows, a butterfly passing, leaves swaying gently, serene coherent motion, steady camera
shots.sfx: peaceful morning birdsong and a gentle breeze in a garden

shots.line: Ei zic 'cottagecore'. Noi ziceam... că suntem săraci.
shots.image_prompt: shrugging with a wry deadpan smile and open palms on the rustic wooden porch, the garden behind her, waist-up front-facing shot
shots.motion_prompt: she shrugs with open palms and a wry deadpan smile to the camera, subtle coherent motion, steady framing

shots.voiceover: Roșii din grădină. Nu de la supermarket, cu cod de bare.
shots.image_prompt: a hand gently picking a ripe red tomato from a green vine in a sunlit village garden, dew droplets on the leaves, close-up
shots.motion_prompt: a hand gently picks a ripe tomato from the vine, the vine springing back, dew droplets trembling, slow satisfying coherent motion, shallow focus
shots.sfx: a tomato being plucked from a vine, leaves rustling, garden ambience

shots.line: Soft life? Eu mulg vaca la cinci dimineața. Asta-i hard life, dragelor.
shots.image_prompt: standing in the sunlit village garden with both hands on her hips and a playful proud grin, golden morning light, waist-up front-facing shot
shots.motion_prompt: she rests her hands on her hips and gives a playful proud grin to the camera, subtle coherent motion, steady framing

shots.voiceover: Dar e frumos. Recunosc. Mai ales când nu trebuie să sapi.
shots.image_prompt: a peaceful sunlit village yard with a wooden bench under a tree, hens wandering, laundry on a line swaying in the breeze, warm golden light, wide shot
shots.motion_prompt: laundry sways gently on the line, hens wander across the yard, dappled light shifting under the tree, serene coherent motion, steady camera
shots.sfx: gentle village ambience with hens and softly rustling laundry

shots.line: Așa că, bine ați venit la țară. Aduceți-vă cizme. Și răbdare.
shots.image_prompt: gesturing warmly toward the garden in a welcoming open-armed pose with a kind smile, on the rustic wooden porch, waist-up front-facing shot
shots.motion_prompt: she gestures warmly toward the garden in a welcoming open-armed pose and smiles kindly, warm coherent motion, steady framing

shots.line: Dați like dacă visați la viața de la țară. Vă aștept cu sarmale. Pupici!
shots.image_prompt: waving goodbye warmly from the rustic porch with her cup of tea in hand, big affectionate smile, golden garden behind her, waist-up front-facing shot
shots.motion_prompt: she waves goodbye warmly from the porch and blows a kiss to the camera, warm smile, gentle coherent natural motion
